name: Mine Sweeper
author: Poki
description: Mine Sweeper is a board game created by MarketJS. Enjoy a reimagined classic where a mine field is waiting to be cleared. Use your wits and memory to unravel the tiles you see. Try and avoid the one with the mine, or it's game over! The empty tile will unravel a number that shows the proximity of the nearest mine. There are 3 difficulty setting and countless hours to sink in. Go ahead and try to clear the field! Controls: Click or tap on any tile to reveal what it's hiding. About the creator: Mine Sweeper is created by MarketJS. Play their other casual games on Poki: 8-ball-pool-with-buddies, mahjong-pyramids, Unblock It , Power Badminton , True Love Calculator , Hangman , Ludo Hero , math-trivia-lite, Super Girl Story and Typing Fighter
